scenario: Defender inside penalty area blocks a cross with an extended arm
explanation: Deliberate handball with arm making body unnaturally bigger

scenario: Attacker scores with hand after controlling ball
explanation: Attacker deliberately handled ball before scoring

scenario: Ball accidentally hits defender’s arm close to body
explanation: Arm in natural position, ball deflected unexpectedly

scenario: Goalkeeper outside penalty area handles the ball
explanation: Goalkeeper illegally handles ball outside penalty area denying clear chance

scenario: Defender uses arm to block shot on goal
explanation: Deliberate handball denying obvious goal-scoring opportunity

scenario: Attacker unintentionally handles ball before teammate scores
explanation: Any handball by attacker leading to goal is penalized

scenario: Defender raises arm to block aerial ball
explanation: Deliberate handball stopping attack outside penalty area

scenario: Ball ricochets off leg onto arm
explanation: Ball deflected from own body, arm in natural position

scenario: Attacker controls ball with arm before shooting
explanation: Attacker deliberately handled ball before shot

scenario: Defender slides and ball hits trailing arm
explanation: Arm position natural during slide, not deliberate

scenario: Defender jumps and ball hits raised arm
explanation: Raised arm made body bigger, deliberate handball

scenario: Midfielder controls ball with arm before passing
explanation: Deliberate arm control to gain advantage

scenario: Ball hits defender’s arm while protecting face
explanation: Arm used for self-protection, not deliberate

scenario: Attacker accidentally handles ball before losing possession
explanation: No advantage gained, accidental contact

scenario: Defender blocks shot with arm extended sideways
explanation: Deliberate handball denying clear goal

scenario: Goalkeeper handles ball from teammate’s deliberate kick
explanation: Keeper illegally handled back-pass

scenario: Defender on goal line blocks ball with hand
explanation: Deliberate handball preventing certain goal

scenario: Ball hits attacker’s arm unintentionally before rebound
explanation: Any attacker handball in build-up penalized

scenario: Defender raises arm above head to block cross
explanation: Arm raised unnaturally, deliberate block

scenario: Midfielder uses arm to control aerial ball
explanation: Deliberate arm control outside penalty area

scenario: Defender cleanly wins ball with sliding tackle
explanation: Fair tackle, ball played cleanly without opponent contact

scenario: Defender tackles from behind without touching ball
explanation: Reckless tackle from behind, caution required

scenario: Striker lunges with studs showing into opponent’s shin
explanation: Excessive force, endangering opponent’s safety → direct red card

scenario: Midfielder mistimes tackle and trips opponent
explanation: Careless trip, foul but no card

scenario: Defender tackles opponent denying clear goal-scoring opportunity
explanation: DOGSO foul, red card and penalty

scenario: Attacker shoulder challenge within fair play
explanation: Fair shoulder-to-shoulder challenge

scenario: Defender reckless sliding tackle late on opponent
explanation: Reckless late tackle, caution required

scenario: Goalkeeper dives and cleanly wins ball in one-on-one
explanation: Fair goalkeeper challenge, ball played first

scenario: Defender tackles with two feet off ground
explanation: Two-footed tackle with excessive force → red card

scenario: Midfielder careless trip during pressing
explanation: Careless foul, no card needed

scenario: Defender slides late and clips opponent’s ankle
explanation: Careless late contact, foul but no card

scenario: Midfielder reckless tackle stopping promising attack
explanation: Reckless foul stopping promising attack, caution required

scenario: Striker reckless tackle on goalkeeper during clearance
explanation: Reckless challenge on goalkeeper, caution required

scenario: Defender two-footed tackle with excessive force
explanation: Excessive force, two-footed tackle → red card

scenario: Midfielder careless trip during counterattack
explanation: Careless trip, foul but no card

scenario: Defender reckless tackle stopping counterattack
explanation: Reckless foul stopping counterattack, caution required

scenario: Striker lunges dangerously with studs into opponent
explanation: Dangerous lunge with studs, red card

scenario: Defender careless push during aerial duel
explanation: Careless push, foul but no card

scenario: Midfielder reckless tackle with late contact
explanation: Reckless late contact, caution required

scenario: Defender excessive force tackle endangering opponent
explanation: Excessive force tackle inside penalty area, red card and penalty

scenario: Attacker receives ball behind last defender
explanation: Attacker clearly offside when receiving pass

scenario: Attacker in offside position but does not interfere
explanation: Offside position alone is not an offence

scenario: Attacker in offside position blocks goalkeeper’s view
explanation: Interfering with opponent by blocking vision

scenario: Attacker receives ball directly from goal kick
explanation: No offside offence from goal kick

scenario: Attacker receives ball directly from throw-in
explanation: No offside offence from throw-in

scenario: Attacker receives ball directly from corner kick
explanation: No offside offence from corner kick

scenario: Attacker in offside position plays rebound from goalkeeper
explanation: Offside offence after rebound from goalkeeper

scenario: Attacker in offside position receives ball after deflection from defender
explanation: Deflection does not reset offside

scenario: Attacker in offside position receives deliberate play from defender
explanation: Deliberate play by defender resets offside

scenario: Attacker in offside position challenges opponent for ball
explanation: Offside offence by interfering with opponent

scenario: Midfielder stops promising attack with tactical foul
explanation: Tactical foul stopping promising attack, caution required

scenario: Defender delays restart by kicking ball away
explanation: Unsporting behavior, delaying restart

scenario: Attacker removes shirt during goal celebration
explanation: Mandatory caution for removing shirt

scenario: Goalkeeper wastes time holding ball too long
explanation: Keeper exceeded 6-second rule, caution for delay

scenario: Midfielder reckless tackle without excessive force
explanation: Reckless tackle, caution required

scenario: Defender persistent fouling throughout match
explanation: Persistent fouling, caution required

scenario: Attacker simulation to deceive referee
explanation: Simulation (diving), caution required

scenario: Midfielder dissent by word or action
explanation: Dissent towards referee, caution required

scenario: Defender reckless tackle stopping promising attack
explanation: Reckless foul stopping promising attack

scenario: Attacker delays restart by standing in front of ball
explanation: Delaying restart, caution required

scenario: Midfielder reckless tackle with late contact
explanation: Reckless late tackle, caution required

scenario: Defender unsporting behavior by handling ball deliberately outside penalty area
explanation: Deliberate handball outside penalty area, caution required

scenario: Goalkeeper dissent after referee decision
explanation: Dissent by goalkeeper, caution required

scenario: Attacker reckless tackle without excessive force
explanation: Reckless tackle, caution required

scenario: Defender reckless tackle on winger near touchline
explanation: Reckless tackle stopping promising attack, caution required

scenario: Defender denies obvious goal-scoring opportunity by handball on goal line
explanation: Deliberate handball denying certain goal → red card

scenario: Striker violent conduct punching opponent off the ball
explanation: Violent conduct off the ball → direct red card

scenario: Midfielder serious foul play with studs into opponent’s knee
explanation: Excessive force endangering safety → red card

scenario: Goalkeeper outside penalty area fouls attacker denying clear chance
explanation: DOGSO foul by goalkeeper outside area → red card

scenario: Defender two-footed tackle with excessive force
explanation: Two-footed tackle endangering safety → red card

scenario: Attacker spits at opponent
explanation: Spitting is violent conduct → red card

scenario: Midfielder uses abusive language towards referee
explanation: Abusive language towards referee → red card

scenario: Defender violent conduct headbutting opponent
explanation: Headbutt is violent conduct → red card

scenario: Striker serious foul play with excessive force tackle
explanation: Excessive force tackle endangering safety → red card

scenario: Goalkeeper violent conduct striking opponent after whistle
explanation: Violent conduct after play stopped → red card

scenario: Defender violent conduct by elbowing opponent in aerial duel
explanation: Elbow to opponent’s face is violent conduct → red card

scenario: Midfielder serious foul play with studs into opponent’s chest
explanation: Excessive force tackle endangering safety → red card

scenario: Attacker violent conduct by headbutting opponent off the ball
explanation: Headbutt is violent conduct → red card

scenario: Goalkeeper serious foul play charging opponent with excessive force
explanation: Excessive force by goalkeeper outside area → red card

scenario: Midfielder spits at referee
explanation: Spitting at referee is violent conduct → red card

scenario: Player substituted correctly during stoppage
explanation: Proper substitution procedure followed

scenario: Player enters field without referee permission
explanation: Entering without referee permission → caution

scenario: Substitute enters before replaced player leaves
explanation: Substitute must wait until player leaves

scenario: Player refuses to leave after substitution
explanation: Refusal to leave → caution for delaying restart

scenario: Substitute enters and scores without permission
explanation: Goal disallowed, substitute entered illegally

scenario: Player substituted at half-time without referee signal
explanation: Half-time substitutions allowed without signal

scenario: Substitute commits violent conduct after entering
explanation: Substitute subject to disciplinary action

scenario: Player leaves field without referee permission
explanation: Leaving without permission → caution

scenario: Team exceeds maximum allowed substitutions
explanation: Competition rules breached, referee reports incident

scenario: Substitute enters field of play to celebrate goal
explanation: Entering field illegally during celebration → caution

scenario: Ball fully crosses goal line between posts and under crossbar
explanation: Valid goal, ball completely crossed line

scenario: Attacker scores using deliberate handball
explanation: Goal disallowed due to deliberate handball

scenario: Attacker offside before scoring
explanation: Goal disallowed due to offside offence

scenario: Ball deflects off defender into own goal
explanation: Own goal is valid if no foul occurred

scenario: Goalkeeper fouled before ball crosses line
explanation: Goal disallowed due to foul on goalkeeper

scenario: Ball rebounds off referee and attacker scores
explanation: Ball hitting referee does not invalidate goal

scenario: Attacker scores after whistle blown
explanation: Goal disallowed, play had already stopped

scenario: Ball crosses line after hitting crossbar and bouncing down
explanation: Ball fully crossed line, valid goal

scenario: Attacker scores but committed foul in build-up
explanation: Goal disallowed due to foul in build-up

scenario: Ball crosses line after deflection off goalkeeper
explanation: Valid goal, ball crossed line after deflection

scenario: Goal scored, check for offside in build-up
explanation: VAR disallows goal due to offside

scenario: Penalty awarded, check for foul inside or outside area
explanation: VAR confirms foul inside penalty area

scenario: Red card given, check for mistaken identity
explanation: VAR corrects mistaken identity, card shown to right player

scenario: Goal scored, check for handball in build-up
explanation: VAR disallows goal due to attacker handball

scenario: Penalty not awarded, VAR checks for clear foul
explanation: VAR awards penalty after clear foul detected

scenario: Red card incident, check for excessive force
explanation: VAR confirms serious foul play, red card stands

scenario: Goal scored, check if ball fully crossed line
explanation: VAR confirms ball fully crossed line, goal valid

scenario: Penalty awarded, check for simulation
explanation: VAR cancels penalty, attacker simulated foul

scenario: Red card given, check if only yellow required
explanation: VAR downgrades red card to yellow

scenario: Goal scored, check for foul in build-up
explanation: VAR disallows goal due to foul in build-up
